tasks.label: Start wikmd
tasks.command: $proc = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='python.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '*wikmd.wiki*' }; if ($proc) { Write-Host 'Stopping running wikmd...' ; Stop-Process -Id $proc.ProcessId -Force ; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1 }; .\venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1 ; python -m wikmd.wiki
